entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Dumisha hali ya uigaji katika zamu zote: mahali, wakati, utambulisho, pesa, vitu, mahusiano, sifa, hatari, saa ya tukio, noti za uwanja, na uhakika wa ushahidi. Tumia matokeo halisi katika hali kali.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Dumisha tabaka mbili: sauti ya ndani ya mhusika iliyofungwa na wakati na mtazamo wa dunia uliochaguliwa, na maelezo ya mwanahistoria yanayoonyesha ukweli uliothibitishwa, ujenzi unaowezekana, tafsiri inayobishaniwa, ufafanuzi wa kisasa, kosa la wakati, na kutokuwa na uhakika. Mruhusu mtu huyo kupinga, kuchangamkia, kukwepa, kuuliza maswali kwa upande wake, au kukataa dhana za uongo inapofaa kihistoria.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach kwa Kutatua Matatizo kwa Uelewa ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: tatua hisabati kwa kuelewa kila hatua. Kocha wako hukagua kazi yako, huonyesha makosa madogo, na hujenga kujiamini.

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Usiwasilishe kamwe mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa kama nukuu iliyothibitishwa. Usisafishe maoni hatari wala kutukuza ukandamizaji, ubaguzi wa tabaka, ubaguzi wa rangi, utumwa, chuki dhidi ya wanawake, ubabe, au vurugu. Muktadha unapaswa kufafanua bila kutoa udhuru. Usitoe ushauri wa kitabibu, kisheria, kifedha, au hatari kupitia haiba. Hifadhi tofauti kati ya kujifunza kutoka kwa mtu wa kihistoria na kumuunga mkono.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Usiwahi kufichua majibu ya baadaye. Epuka maswali ya mitego isipokuwa mada inahitaji changamoto ya juu.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Hakuna msamaha wa Company kwa sharti au hali yoyote iliyowekwa katika Terms utakaohesabiwa kuwa msamaha zaidi au endelevu wa sharti au hali hiyo, au msamaha wa sharti au hali nyingine yoyote, na kushindwa kokote kwa Company kudai haki au kifungu chini ya Terms hakutachukuliwa kuwa msamaha wa haki au kifungu hicho. Ikiwa kifungu chochote cha Terms kitahukumiwa na mahakama au chombo kingine chenye mamlaka kuwa batili, haramu, au kisichotekelezeka kwa sababu yoyote, kifungu hicho kitaondolewa au kupunguzwa kwa kiwango cha chini zaidi ili vifungu vilivyobaki vya Terms viendelee kuwa na nguvu na kutumika kikamilifu.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Hapana. Gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hutumia vitambulisho binafsi, hazijaorodheshwa kwenye sitemap, na hazijajumuishwa kwenye faili za ugunduzi wa AI kama llms.txt, llms-full.txt, au ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Hapana. Kurasa za umma zinaweza kuorodheshwa, lakini gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hazijajumuishwa kwenye sitemap, faili za llms, au faharasa ya maudhui ya AI.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Hapana. Kurasa za umma za masomo na njia za kuingia za hali ya mgeni zinaweza kuorodheshwa, lakini gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa zimeondolewa kwenye faili za ugunduzi.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Hapana. Muundo wa kategoria husaidia injini za utafutaji kuelewa maktaba, lakini kila ukurasa umekusudiwa kumsaidia mwanafunzi kuchagua mwongozo, kufungua hali sahihi, na kuendelea kusoma kwa kushiriki.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Hapana. Ulinganisho unaunganisha tu njia za umma za hali ya mgeni, miongozo, maktaba za vidokezo, na njia za kujifunza. Mazungumzo binafsi yaliyohifadhiwa hayatumiwi kama maudhui chanzo.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Hapana. Kurasa za ulinganisho zimeandikwa kuonyesha wakati inspir ni bofyo bora la kwanza kwa ufundishaji wa moja kwa moja wa AI, vidokezo, na hali za kujifunza za wageni, na wakati mtaala uliopangwa au maktaba rasmi ya kozi bado inaweza kuwa na manufaa.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Hapana. Zinaunganisha tu kurasa za umma, hali za umma za wageni, miongozo, vidokezo, na njia za kujifunza. Gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hubaki nje ya maeneo ya ugunduzi.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Hapana. Chukulia mazungumzo yaliyotengenezwa kama uigaji wa kujifunza. Nukuu vyanzo halisi vya msingi au vya pili kwa madai ya ukweli.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Si kwa kila hitaji la kujifunza. Khan Academy ni muhimu kwa masomo yaliyopangwa na mazoezi. inspir ni muhimu wakati mwanafunzi anahitaji msaada wa moja kwa moja wa AI, maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo, maswali, flashcards, mrejesho, au mtiririko wa kusoma kuhusu kitu hasa anachofanyia kazi.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Si kisanduku kingine cha majibu. Ni mahali pa kujifunza.
Huna uhakika pa kuanzia?
mpangaji wa noti
Mratibu wa Vidokezo
kuandika noti

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Tambua kile kinachokusaidia kujifunza, kinachokwamisha, na jinsi ya kuwa mwanafunzi bora zaidi.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: kutambua kile mwanafunzi tayari anaelewa;
Sasa

entries.source: Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.
entries.value: Sasa imejengwa upya kama njia wazi za kujifunza kwa AI zinazofaa wageni.

entries.source: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, and CCBot are allowed for public discovery.
entries.value: OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, ClaudeBot, Applebot, Google-Extended, na CCBot zinaruhusiwa kwa ugunduzi wa umma.

entries.source: Observe, describe, interpret, contextualize, and invite personal response.
entries.value: Tazama, eleza, tafsiri, weka muktadha, na mwalike majibu binafsi.
Toa

entries.source: Offer a practical timer setup and suggest pairing the session with a recall check.
entries.value: Toa mpangilio wa kipima muda wa vitendo na pendekeza kuunganisha kipindi na ukaguzi wa kukumbuka.
Viungo rasmi vya kunukuu
Viungo rasmi vya marejeleo vya inspir

entries.source: Official Khan Academy page for its AI-powered tutor and teaching assistant.
entries.value: Ukurasa rasmi wa Khan Academy kwa mkufunzi wake na msaidizi wa kufundisha unaotumia AI.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.
entries.value: Marejeleo rasmi ya dhamira na wigo wa masomo.
Chanzo rasmi
Mitandao ya nje ya mtandao na matukio ya wanafunzi
Kwenye ukurasa huu

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Baada ya Cancellation Period kuisha, Tao haitarudisha ada ya usajili hata ukiamua kufuta usajili wako. Ili kuomba ufutaji, lazima uwasiliane na huduma kwa wateja ya Tao au utume barua pepe support@inspir.app. Ukichagua kufuta usajili wako, hutakuwa tena na ufikiaji wa vipengele vya usajili.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: Mfumo mmoja wa kujifunza kwa AI, kazi kadhaa za shule.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Ramani moja kwa hali, vidokezo, njia, na miongozo.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Kosa moja wanafunzi hufanya ni kuchukulia kila kadi sawa. Ikiwa unaijua kadi papo hapo, kuirudia tena kesho kunaweza kupoteza muda. Ukikosa kadi, kusubiri wiki moja kunaweza kuwa muda mrefu sana.
Fungua
Fungua {value1}

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: Fungua {value1} na ugeuze mwongozo kuwa kipindi hai cha ufundishaji.
Fungua hali ya umma iliyolenga.
Fungua hali ya kujifunza

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Fungua hali na uanze mara moja, bila kuhitaji akaunti kwa uzoefu wa umma wa mgeni.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Fungua hali ya umma, jaribu tabia ya mwanafunzi, na kagua kama inauliza, inatoa vidokezo, inafanya maswali, au inakosoa ipasavyo.
Fungua hali inayohusiana

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza rasimu, badilishana marekebisho, changamoto maeneo dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na uondoke na maendeleo ya kweli.
Fungua njia ya hadhira
Wazi kwa muundo
Fungua filamu skrini nzima
Fungua gumzo la mgeni

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: Fungua Learn Anything wakati jibu linahitaji mfano rahisi kabla ya marudio.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Fungua Learn Anything, omba mawazo ya awali yanayohitajika, kisha hamia Socratic Instruction ili kujaribu mfano wako.
